_comment: Provider registry. `priority` is the PROVIDER_PRIORITY rank (lower = more authoritative) used by the preferred-pick tiebreak. `license`/`attribution`/`doi`/`contact` travel with every observation as provenance (publish-all posture — see design §11). Set `active:false` to hold a source out without deleting its config. `parse` selects the response parser; `queryFormat` is the FDSN `format` query param value.

providers.name: USGS (ANSS ComCat)
providers.attribution: U.S. Geological Survey (ANSS ComCat)

providers.name: EMSC / CSEM (seismicportal)
providers.attribution: EMSC/CSEM, https://www.emsc-csem.org

providers.name: GEOFON / GFZ Potsdam
providers.attribution: GEOFON Program, GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences

providers.name: INGV (Italy)
providers.attribution: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)

providers.name: GeoNet (New Zealand)
providers.attribution: GeoNet (GNS Science / Toka Tū Ake EQC), New Zealand

providers.name: RESIF (France)
providers.attribution: RESIF / Réseau Sismologique et géodésique Français

providers.name: NOA (Greece)
providers.attribution: National Observatory of Athens (NOA), Institute of Geodynamics

providers.name: ETH Zürich / Swiss Seismological Service
providers.attribution: Swiss Seismological Service (SED) at ETH Zürich

providers.name: Earthquakes Canada (NRCan)
providers.attribution: Natural Resources Canada — Earthquakes Canada

providers.name: Northern California Earthquake Data Center
providers.attribution: NCEDC (UC Berkeley Seismological Laboratory & USGS)

providers.name: Southern California Earthquake Data Center
providers.attribution: SCEDC (Caltech / USGS)

providers.name: KNMI (Netherlands)
providers.attribution: Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute (KNMI)

providers.name: AusPass (Australia)
providers.attribution: AusPass — Australian Passive Seismic Server (ANU)

providers.name: AFAD (Turkey)
providers.attribution: AFAD — Republic of Türkiye, Disaster and Emergency Management Presidency (deprem.afad.gov.tr)
providers.notes: Custom JSON. Local time UTC+3 (adapter converts). Dense small local events down to ~M0.6.

providers.name: CENC — China Earthquake Networks Center
providers.attribution: China Earthquake Networks Center (CENC), China Earthquake Administration — www.ceic.ac.cn
providers.notes: Custom JSON rolling file. Beijing time UTC+8 (adapter converts). Mainland China local events.

providers.name: NCS — National Center for Seismology (India)
providers.attribution: National Center for Seismology (NCS), Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India — riseq.seismo.gov.in
providers.notes: Custom: events embedded as data-json attributes in HTML. IST UTC+5:30 (adapter converts). India/Himalaya.

providers.name: TMD — Thai Meteorological Department
providers.attribution: Thai Meteorological Department (TMD), Earthquake Observation Division — earthquake.tmd.go.th
providers.notes: Custom JSON, otime already UTC. Covers Thailand AND Myanmar (Myanmar has no native open feed).

providers.name: KAGSR — Kamchatka Branch GS RAS (Russia)
providers.attribution: Kamchatka Branch, Geophysical Survey of the Russian Academy of Sciences (KB GS RAS), sdis.emsd.ru
providers.notes: Custom non-standard FDSN geojson (only format=geojson works). FLAKY: adapter retries 3x + browser UA. Local Kamchatka/Kuril events USGS misses — the only open real-time Russia source.

providers.name: BMKG (Indonesia)
providers.attribution: Badan Meteorologi, Klimatologi, dan Geofisika (BMKG)
providers.notes: TODO custom adapter: WIB (UTC+7) timestamps, latest-N JSON, no time-range query.

providers.name: JMA (Japan, via p2pquake mirror)
providers.attribution: Japan Meteorological Agency (JMA) via P2P地震情報
providers.notes: TODO custom adapter: JMA times are Asia/Tokyo (UTC+9); depth in meters on the raw JMA feed.

providers.name: Raspberry Shake
providers.attribution: Raspberry Shake, S.A. citizen-science network
providers.notes: TODO enable on the heavy 15-min sub-schedule (firehose of M0.5+ globally).
